data.content: Refactored transitionToRetry() to route retry-state advancement through an explicit memory-manager dispatch helper (knots -> nextKnot with expectedState, beads -> nextBeat). Added retry transition dispatch tests in verification-orchestrator.test for both manager types. Gates run in worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit pass, bun run test pass (2021 total), NODE_ENV=production bun run build pass.
